title: the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1990.
description: the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1990.
text: REGISTERED NO.D (D.N) 127 The Gazette Of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 195] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, MAY 23,1990/JYAISTHA 2,1912 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation 1353 GI/90 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SBS. 3(i)l -- 2 of 4 -- 3 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd May, 1990 G. S.R. 507(E):—In exercise of the po wers conferred by section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1873(5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to am;nd the Post Office Time Deposit Rules, 1981, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Post Office Time Deposit (Amend- ment) Rules, 1990. (2)They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Post Office Time Deposit Rules, 1981,- (a) in rule 4,- (i) in sub-rule (1) for the word "deposits" the words "a deposit" shall be substituted; (ii) in Table below sub- rule (2), against S. No.55— Charitable Endow- ment account, under colunm (3), for the words "one account" the words "one or more accounts" shall be substituted. (b) in rule 5,- (i) for sub-rule (1) the following sub-rule shall bs b ; substituted, namely:- "There shall be only one deposit in an account. The deposit shall be in a multiple of fifty rupees. There is no maximum lira it for the amount of deposit in an account". -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—S6.& 3<!>] (if) in sub-rule (2), for the words "Each deposit" the words ' 'The deposit" shall be substituted. (c) in rule 6, in sub-rule (1) for the words "re-deposit the amount in the same or another account, as the case may ba", ths word s "redeposit the amount in a new account to bs opened" shall be substituted. (d) in rule 10, in sub-rule (4), the word "Last" shall be omitted. (e) in rule 11, in sub-rule (2), for the words "any outstanding amount of deposits", the words "any outstanding amount of deposit" shall be substituted. [F.No. 2/28/86-NS.II]' JANAKI KATHPALIA, Jt. Secy Note-:The .principal rules ware published vid? GSR No. 664 (E) dated 17.12.81 and amended vidj GSR No, 300(E) dated 1.4.1982, GSR No.257(E) dated 11.3.1983, GSR No. 418(E) dated 10.5.1985, GSR No.l03(E) dated 12.2.86, GSR No. 362(E) dated 1.4.87, GSR No. 1005(E) dated 23.12.87 and GSR No. 353 (E) dated 18.3.1988.
